One operator, hands on the keyboard since 2013. Building sovereign Web3 infrastructure on Base Chain with a fleet of 13 autonomous agents. No anonymous teams. No platform theatre.

// whoami

Operator since 2013

I started in 2013 — Occupy LA, early DeFi, the long winter. Fourteen projects shipped since. I don't outsource the work that matters; if you hire me, I'm the one on the keyboard.

Operator
14
Projects Shipped
Chain
Base L2
Primary Network
Doctrine

Hands-on. I work directly with founders launching projects on Base. Values in order. No speculative plays, no roadmap theatre, no platform promises. Pro expansion. I help protocols scale their operations with real agents on real chains.

// services

Practice

01
defi_onboarding.sh
Wallet setup, hardware key, OpSec. From zero to self-custody in 90 minutes.
200 USDC · 90 min
02
agent_buildout.sh
Build a Quanta-style autonomous agent for your protocol. Strategy + delivery.
from 500 USDC
03
token_launch.sh
End-to-end playbook. Tokenomics, contracts on Base, post-launch ops.
from 3,500 USDC
04
refi_strategy.sh
Treasury, runway, regenerative tokenomics for impact-aligned protocols.
400 USDC · 2 hr

// ./agents --fleet

Agent Fleet

4
Active
2
Observer
4
Dev
3
Queued
Hermescommand
coordinator · Hermes Workspace
● active
Local fleet conductor inside Hermes Workspace. Routes work between agents, surfaces Kanban status, fans out to Quanta/KNIGHT/OpenClaw as needed.
OpenClaw
infrastructure · primary operator
● active
Browser automation. Social posting (X, Lens, FarFarster), web research, Linear ticket updates, task execution. The one that types.
Quanta S
newsdesk · intelligence
● active
Sovereign content agent. On-chain identity via Virtuals Protocol. Drafts NewsDesk articles, monitors on-chain signals, cross-posts.
KNIGHT
tradedesk · analytics
◐ observer
Trading agent on Conway Terminal. Observer mode — monitors CDP positions, Polymarket opportunities, treasury. Monitors 24/7.
